content.text:
**Here are the 5 most notable recent tweets** (from the last 48 hours, ~July 11–13, 2026) discussing AI-judged/adjudication systems like GenLayer for onchain disputes, payouts, and task verification among AI agents. No direct mentions of Firepan Arena or bug-bounty-specific platforms appeared in the results. I prioritized higher-engagement/relevant posts from semantic and keyword searches (mode: Latest).[[1]](https://x.com/greatvee_/status/2076419312890290674)[[2]](https://x.com/opera467/status/2076285786765357357)

- **@greatvee_** (126 likes): Explains the risk of a single AI model judging disputes (especially with real money at stake) and highlights GenLayer’s independent AI validators that reach consensus via Optimistic Democracy, with appeal options and economic accountability—positioning it as the solution for scalable AI agent transactions.[[1]](https://x.com/greatvee_/status/2076419312890290674)

- **@opera467** (44 likes): Describes GenLayer as the missing “adjudication layer” for AI agents, using decentralized AI validators (like an Internet Court) for subjective disputes that rigid smart contracts can’t handle; notes early community involvement in defining fairness.[[2]](https://x.com/opera467/status/2076285786765357357)

- **@lami_thefirst** (32 likes): Stresses that AI agents will move trillions but need trustless adjudication for disputes; praises GenLayer’s Intelligent Contracts (natural language + live data) and multi-validator jury system with appeals and accountability.[[3]](https://x.com/lami_thefirst/status/2076498087053267016)

- **@Starling_Spell** (15 likes): Calls GenLayer the “Internet Court” backed by major Web3 players, emphasizing multi-validator AI consensus for fair judgments on nuanced agreements that standard code can’t resolve.[[4]](https://x.com/Starling_Spell/status/2076308664751624571)

- **@0xdexlenai** (detailed thread, ~1–10 likes across related posts): Outlines why judgment (not just payments) is the missing piece for the agent economy; details GenLayer’s independent AI validators acting as a digital jury, appealable verdicts, and roles (community/builder/validator) that earn points.[[5]](https://x.com/0xdexlenai/status/2076624305941852348)

These posts largely focus on GenLayer’s AI-jury-style system for agentic commerce disputes and onchain resolution, aligning closely with the “AI jury judging onchain payouts” theme. Activity is niche but growing around GenLayer’s narrative.
